title: quercus pagoda
intro: Quercus pagoda, also known as the Chinese evergreen oak, is a species of deciduous tree native to China and Southeast Asia. The bark and leaves of Quercus pagoda have been used in traditional medicine for their astringent and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to soothe digestive issues and reduce fever. The health benefits of Quercus pagoda include its ability to protect against cardiovascular disease, improve immune function, and exhibit antioxidant activity. Quercus pagoda can be prepared as a decoction or infusion by steeping the dried bark or leaves in hot water, or as a tincture by mixing the extract with a carrier oil or spirit.
